testcase.name: Login berhasil
testcase.system-out: Given pengguna membuka halaman login........................................passed When pengguna memasukkan username "tomsmith"................................passed And pengguna memasukkan password "SuperSecretPassword!".....................passed And pengguna menekan tombol login...........................................passed Then login berhasil.........................................................passed

testcase.name: Login gagal
testcase.system-out: Given pengguna membuka halaman login........................................passed When pengguna memasukkan username "admin"...................................passed And pengguna memasukkan password "12345"....................................passed And pengguna menekan tombol login...........................................passed Then muncul pesan login gagal...............................................passed

testcase.name: Username kosong
testcase.system-out: Given pengguna membuka halaman login........................................passed When pengguna memasukkan username ""........................................passed And pengguna memasukkan password "password".................................passed And pengguna menekan tombol login...........................................passed Then muncul pesan login gagal...............................................passed

testcase.name: Username sangat panjang
testcase.system-out: Given pengguna membuka halaman login........................................passed When pengguna memasukkan username "aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa".passed And pengguna memasukkan password "password".................................passed And pengguna menekan tombol login...........................................passed Then muncul pesan login gagal...............................................passed

testcase.name: Register user successfully
testcase.system-out: Given Register API tersedia.................................................passed When User register menggunakan data dari "Register.json"....................passed Then Response status code adalah 201........................................passed And Response success bernilai true..........................................passed

testcase.name: Register gagal
testcase.system-out: Given Register API tersedia.................................................passed When User register menggunakan data dari "Registernegative.json"............passed Then Response status code error.............................................passed And Response success bernilai false.........................................passed
